text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...So that's why King made all these flashy plans, huh? To get people
cheering louder at the Fan Fest.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. She has a vision. She wants her cheers to encourage all the
competitors at every event.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Plus...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Guess what, King! I jumped 3cm farther than yesterday! That's a new
record for me! I'm feeling confident I'll win at the real event!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
She's prepared to do anything for her admiring fan, who also happens
to be my precious roommate.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
So that's why I don't think King would turn to me if she ever needed
help.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ah... You mean because...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Heh. I don't think she'd want to risk her biggest fan hearing anything
even slightly uncool about her.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
So if she gets too caught up in doing things her own way, it's up to
you to show her a new perspective. All right? ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Awww, why me?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
We have a special cheer practice today. At the real Fan Fest, the
squad will be cheering alongside huge crowds of visitors, and we
have to make it a grand success.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That's why we've been granted this opportunity. With permission from
the academy, we get to invite fans to join us and practice like it's the
real event.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Uh, excuse me. Do you know which way it is to get to the track?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh! You must be here for the practice session! I'll take you right
there!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
(We only get to hold two of these practice sessions. I have to work
everything out perfectly during practice so that on the big day...)

text_block_list.name: Fans at the Fan Fest
text_block_list.text: Hooray! Hooray! Tracen! Fight, fight, Umamusume! Go!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
You truly are a first-rate cheer captain! Thanks to you, I got first place
and totally smashed the Tracen Academy record!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Heh heh, I will make sure it's an undeniable success!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, so this is where the practice session is going on. I've got to
cheer loud enough to match the girls!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I brought along the megaphone I used last year! I hope our
cheers will be as great as last year's!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Looks like everyone is here! In that case, let's get right into it. Get
your cheer on so everything's perfect for the big day! Come on!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, the music is booming! Wait... That person on the
trumpet—haven't I seen them on TV?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! I hired a first-rate brass band for the occasion! Whatever it
takes, there's no stop I won't pull out!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Now, everyone! Cheer loud, cheer proud, and have some fun! I grant
you all the right to match my enthusiasm!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh... There she goes again...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
After putting in all this effort, there's no way it could go wrong! From
the very first practice to the big day, we're guaranteed to be a hit
every time!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Everyone, let's try one more time with the trumpet! Aaand—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Bmm ba bmm, bmm bmm ba ba, bidi badadum!)

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ahhh...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Um, were we all chanting in time?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Uhhh... kind of?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes, you were all great! Those were some fiery cheers! Ohohoho!
I've still got lots more tricks up my sleeve!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: So... off I go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whistle...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: That sure is a lot of pretty balloons you sent up into the sky...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It's not a cheer without balloons—that's what I saw online! Doesn't this
make you all want to shout out loud?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Go ahead, feel free to shout out your encouragement! Go for it!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: G... go for it?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's it! Go—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Cough, cough, cough!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: King!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Let's take a break here. I know you want to do your best, but you've
been shouting at full volume this whole time...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
No, I can't. Look, they're not excited at all! As the leader, I have to
take charge and get everyone fired up!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh? Where you going? Wait, King?!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what's going on?!
A spotlight?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Everyone, let's get into the groove! Come on, put your hands up!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Whaaaaa?! You were hiding another one of your crazy ideas from us?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: HEEEEEY! Loud noise and light pollution are PROHIBITED!

text_block_list.name: Cheer Squad and Fans
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for today.
Thank you.
Thanks for having us.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: That was... a bit of a mess.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Well, it was only the first session... Hope it goes better on the big
day...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Hi, King. Good work today. Are we going ahead with tonight's
practice? I'm happy to help iron out any kinks!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh, um...

text_block_list.name: Squad Member A
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, I messed up the choreo and the chant...

text_block_list.name: Squad Member C
text_block_list.text:
We've got a regular practice session tomorrow, too. Let's make sure we rest up
properly for it.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...No, let's cancel. I imagine we're all tired from dealing with so many
people today.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Next time for sure, let's get it right! Well, see you tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
So if she gets too caught up in doing things her own way, it's up to
you to show her a new perspective. All right? ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: If it went like that at the real event...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: The cheers are... dreadfully lacking!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ahh... I see how it is. No one wants to support me. I feel kind of...
weak...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
No, King! You promised yourself you'd make the cheers a success!
You can't lose hope after just one or two failures!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I have to lead the crowd better. I have to step up and cheer in a way
that will stir everyone around me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That's it! I'll get an electric display board! That way I can show
everyone when to chant! Then with the music...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Out on a night walk too?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Nature?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we walk together for a bit? I could do with the change of
pace too.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Come on, King.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Let's go see things from another perspective.
